reasoning: Duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_54 (Pulse tool vs CSA). sc is assigned at L6 from malloc() before free(sc) at L12. sc is not uninitialized. PC = !_STDLIB_H AND !__malloc_and_calloc_defined AND SHARED_MODULE — restrictive library macros cause Pulse to treat malloc return as uninitialized when stdlib.h is not processed in the desugared state. False positive.
